Article Title: Times Internet Half Marathon 2026: The men who defined the 21K with power & precision
Article Text:
Mukesh Kumar : Experience that led from the front

.

Vishnu Kumar : The emergence of a new force

.

Shivam: Precision, patience, and a perfect finish

.

More than a race, a benchmark of excellence

The Times Internet Half Marathon 2026 brought Delhi to life in a spectacle of endurance, discipline, and collective energy, as over 15,000 runners gathered to test their limits on one of the city’s most iconic routes.The build-up began on March 27th and 28th at the Marathon Expo - a vibrant convergence of athletes, enthusiasts, and fitness communities. The venue buzzed with anticipation, conversations, and a shared commitment to the run. It was more than a pre-race ritual; it was the ignition point of a movement that would soon take over the city.On the morning of March 29th, as the first light broke over India Gate, that anticipation transformed into action.Thousands of runners lined up, each carrying a personal goal, a story, and a reason to run. The early kilometres were marked by energy and momentum, but as the race progressed, the true nature of the half marathon revealed itself. The 21K is not merely a test of speed - it is a measure of resilience, pacing, and mental strength.As fatigue set in and the distance began to challenge even the most prepared, the race separated the determined from the exceptional.Amidst this, three runners rose above the rest - not just as winners, but as defining figures of the race.Mukesh Kumar’s run was a masterclass in control and composure. From the outset, he displayed the calm assurance of a seasoned athlete, maintaining a steady pace while others surged ahead in bursts of early enthusiasm.As the race entered its demanding middle phase, Mukesh began to assert his presence. With calculated precision, he increased his pace, capitalising on the fatigue creeping into the field. There was no visible urgency - only confidence, built on experience and deep understanding of long-distance racing.He crossed the finish line in 1:07:24, securing first place with authority and reinforcing the value of patience and strategy in a race defined by endurance.In a field dominated by seasoned runners, Vishnu Kumar delivered a performance that signalled the arrival of a promising new contender.Running with discipline and intent, he stayed within striking distance of the lead pack through the early and middle stages of the race. His approach reflected maturity - measured pacing, controlled breathing, and a clear focus on sustaining momentum.As the race intensified in its final stretch, Vishnu held his ground with remarkable consistency, refusing to yield under pressure. He secured second place with a timing of 1:08:26, marking a breakthrough moment in his running journey.More than a podium finish, it was a statement of potential - one that positions him as a runner to watch in the seasons ahead.Shivam’s race was defined by strategy - a calculated approach that paid off when it mattered most.Opting for in the early kilometres, he resisted the temptation to match the initial pace of the leaders. Instead, he conserved energy, focusing on maintaining rhythm and efficiency.That decision proved decisive in the latter stages of the race. As fatigue began to impact others, Shivam accelerated with purpose. His late surge saw him overtake multiple runners, turning patience into performance.He finished third with a timing of 1:08:59, delivering a run that highlighted the importance of timing, discipline, and tactical awareness in long-distance racing.The Times Internet Half Marathon 2026 was not just about crossing the finish line - it was about pushing boundaries, embracing challenges, and redefining what is possible.In a race that saw thousands participate, Mukesh Kumar, Vishnu Kumar, and Shivam stood apart - not just for their timings, but for the stories their runs told. Stories of preparation, perseverance, and the relentless pursuit of excellence.They did not simply win the race.They set the standard.
Article Summary: The times internet half marathon 2026 brought delhi to life in a spectacle of endurance, discipline, and collective energy. Over 15,000 runners gathered to test their limits on one of the city’s most iconic routes. Mukesh kumar, vishnu kumar, and shivam stood apart - not just for their timings, but for the stories their runs told.

Article Title: Times Internet half marathon: Women who stood strong in the 21K
Article Text:
.

Arpita Saini : Composure at the front

Ruksaana : Precision through discipline

.

Bhumi Negi : Strength in progression

.

Where the race is won

In the quiet stillness of early morning at India Gate, the city held its breath before the surge. At precisely 5.30 am, the 21K race of the Times Internet Half Marathon 2026 flagged off, releasing a field of 2,639 runners onto one of the capital’s most evocative stretches.The opening kilometres were steady and controlled. Runners settled into their pace, saving energy for the later stages. As Delhi slowly woke up, its wide roads and historic surroundings set the stage for a race that would soon become a true test of endurance.Because a half-marathon never reveals itself at the start.The 21K course cut through the ceremonial heart of the capital, along wide, tree-lined boulevards linking key centres of governance. Long, open stretches tested pacing, while gentle turns demanded control - making it a route that challenged not just endurance, but composure at every step.Arpita Saini claimed the top position with a chip time of 01:25:01, delivering a race built on control and clarity.At 30, her journey into running began only a few years ago, sparked by a simple yet powerful image - young aspirants in her village preparing for army recruitment.What began as curiosity soon turned into commitment. Initial hesitation at home gradually gave way to belief, as her persistence reshaped perceptions.On race day, there was no excess, no haste. She settled early, held her rhythm through the middle stages, and when the race demanded resilience, she responded with authority. In the final stretch, she did not chase the race - she commanded it.Finishing second with a chip time of 01:27:38, Ruksaana’s performance was a study in structure and steadiness.A national-level distance runner and a Khelo India Games medallist, she continues to balance the rigours of competitive sport with academics as a second-year college student. Training under the watchful guidance of her father, a PT teacher, her foundation is rooted in discipline.Her preparation reflects this methodical approach. On race day, it translated seamlessly - controlled early kilometres, a steady build-up, and an unwavering hold through the demanding final phases. There was no visible struggle, only quiet execution.Bhumi Negi secured third place with a chip time of 01:34:33, completing the podium with a performance that underscored patience and progression.Having begun her running journey at a young age, she has steadily transitioned from shorter distances to longer formats, earning recognition at both national and international levels. Her growth has been incremental, but assured.Her race mirrored that evolution. Conservative at the start, calculated through the middle, and resilient when the race tightened its grip. As fatigue set in across the field, she found another gear - one driven not by urgency, but by experience.After the 17th kilometre, the race became really tough. Runners started to feel tired, and every step needed more effort. This is where true strength shows - not in how fast you run, but in your ability to keep going.Arpita Saini, Ruksaana, and Bhumi Negi did more than navigate these final kilometres.They defined them.In a field of thousands, on a course that tested both body and mind, these women did not merely finish the 21K - they elevated it, setting a benchmark not just for performance, but for what it means to endure, adapt, and ultimately, prevail.
Article Summary: Arpita saini claimed the top position with a chip time of 01:25:01, delivering a race built on control and clarity. Ruksaana’s performance was a study in structure and steadiness, finishing second. Bhumi negi completed the podium with a performance that underscored patience and progression.

Article Title: Kirk Cousins: Kirk Cousins joins Las Vegas Raiders as Klint Kubiak makes bold veteran call before rookie quarterback plan unfolds
Article Text:
Kirk Cousins (Image Via Getty)

Kirk Cousins and Klint Kubiak reunion gives Las Vegas Raiders a steady plan at quarterback

The Las Vegas Raiders have made a clear move before the new season. They have agreed to sign Kirk Cousins, as confirmed by his agent on Thursday. The deal details are not out yet, but the message is simple. The team wants an experienced quarterback in the room right now.This comes just two days after new head coach Klint Kubiak openly said he wanted a veteran QB. The Raiders are also expected to pick a young quarterback in the upcoming draft. So this move is about balance. They want someone steady now, while preparing for the future at the same time.For Kirk Cousins, this is a fresh start after leaving the Atlanta Falcons. His time there had good moments, but it also came with injuries and tough phases. Now, he walks into a situation where he is clearly needed.The Raiders had only Aidan O’Connell on their roster after trading Geno Smith to the New York Jets. So adding Cousins fills a big gap right away.There is also a familiar face waiting for him. Cousins and Klint Kubiak worked together earlier with the Minnesota Vikings. During that time, Cousins played some of his best football.He threw for over 12,000 yards and 94 touchdowns in three seasons. In 2021, he even made the Pro Bowl.Kubiak has been very clear about his plan. He said, “Ideally, you don’t want him to start day one. You’d love him to be able to learn behind somebody. That’s in a perfect world.” That line explains everything. The Raiders are likely to draft a young QB, possibly Fernando Mendoza, but they don’t want to rush him.Cousins fits that role perfectly. He brings experience, calmness, and a clear way of running the offense. A young player can learn by just watching him every day.Looking back, Cousins has had a long career. He started with Washington after being picked in 2012. Over 14 seasons, he has thrown for 44,700 yards and 298 touchdowns. Even last season, he showed he can still contribute. He stepped in late and helped his team finish strong.So this move is not just about one season. It’s about building the right setup. The Raiders now have a bridge between present and future, and Cousins is right in the middle of it.
Article Summary: Kirk cousins and klint kubiak reunion gives las vegas raiders a steady plan at quarterback. The raiders are also expected to pick a young quarterback in the upcoming draft. This move is about balance. They want someone steady now, while preparing for the future at the same time.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Abhishek Sharma scripts history, joins David Warner to....
Article Text:
SRH opener Abhishek Sharma (PTI Photo)

Watch Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner

SRH post big total, bowlers seal commanding win

KKR start strong but collapse under pressure

Sunrisers Hyderabad batter Abhishek Sharma etched his name in the franchise’s record books, becoming only the second player after David Warner to complete 100 sixes for SRH in the Indian Premier League.The left-hander reached the milestone during SRH’s clash against Kolkata Knight Riders, smashing a quickfire 48 off 21 balls, including four boundaries and four sixes at a strike rate of over 228. Abhishek now has 101 sixes for the franchise, second only to Warner’s tally of 143. In 76 matches for SRH, he has scored 1,808 runs at an average of 26.58 and a strike rate of 162.88, including one century and nine fifties.Sunrisers Hyderabad delivered a dominant all-round performance to defeat Kolkata Knight Riders by 65 runs at Eden Gardens, registering their first win of IPL 2026.After posting a formidable 226/8, the highest total of the season so far, SRH’s bowlers backed it up with a clinical effort. Jaydev Unadkat led the charge with impressive figures of 3/21, while Eshan Malinga, Nitish Kumar Reddy, and Harsh Dubey applied consistent pressure as KKR were bowled out for 161 in just 16 overs.The win was significant as it marked the first successful defence of a total in this year’s tournament.Chasing 227, KKR got off to a flying start with Finn Allen smashing 28 off just seven balls, including a 25-run opening over. However, SRH struck back quickly, with Dubey removing Allen via a sharp caught-and-bowled effort.Ajinkya Rahane and Angkrish Raghuvanshi then stitched a 37-run stand to steady the innings, with Raghuvanshi continuing his fine form.But SRH regained control as Unadkat dismissed Rahane with a slower ball, while a mix-up led to Cameron Green’s run-out at the end of the powerplay, leaving KKR at 74/3.Raghuvanshi went on to score his second consecutive fifty, reaching the milestone in 27 balls, before being run out for 52. Nitish Kumar Reddy then struck twice in quick succession, removing Anukul Roy and Rinku Singh to dent KKR’s chase further.Sunil Narine provided a brief counterattack, but Malinga dismissed him and Ramandeep Singh in successive overs. Unadkat returned to wrap up the innings by removing Kartik Tyagi and Varun Chakaravarthy, sealing a comprehensive win for SRH.
Article Summary: Sunrisers hyderabad beat kolkata knight riders by 65 runs at eden gardens. Abhishek sharma becomes second player after david warner to complete 100 sixes for srh in the indian premier league. Jaydev unadkat took 3/21, while eshan malinga, nitish kumar reddy, and harsh dubey applied consistent pressure as kkr were bowled out for 161 in just 16 overs.

Article Text:
Chennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad, left, and Sanju Samson. (AP Photo)

CSK vs PBKS Head-to-Head

Total matches played: 32

Chennai Super Kings will need a marked improvement across all departments when they take on Punjab Kings in their first home game of the IPL 2026 on Friday. Their campaign began on a disappointing note with a comprehensive defeat to Rajasthan Royals in Guwahati, where a youthful CSK side failed to click in any facet of the game.Returning to Chepauk, conditions are expected to favour batting, offering CSK a chance to reset. There is also a possibility of MS Dhoni being back in the dugout despite his calf strain, providing valuable guidance to skipper Ruturaj Gaikwad.Much will depend on the batting unit stepping up. Sanju Samson, the marquee signing, had a quiet debut and will be eager to deliver in front of the home crowd. The availability of Dewald Brevis remains uncertain, while Sarfaraz Khan showed glimpses of promise despite a short stay. Youngsters like Kartik Sharma are also expected to grow into the tournament.The bowling attack, led by Matt Henry and Noor Ahmad, will be keen to bounce back after being dominated in the opener.Punjab Kings, last season’s finalists, arrive as a confident unit under Shreyas Iyer. With contributions from Cooper Connolly, Yuzvendra Chahal and Vijaykumar Vyshak, they look well-balanced, though their middle order will aim for greater consistency.Recent matches at MA Chidambaram Stadium have shown that the surface hasn’t offered much assistance to quick bowlers. The consistent pace and even bounce have instead made stroke-making easier, allowing batters to play through the line with confidence — a trend that could well continue in the IPL. Former Australia wicketkeeper Brad Haddin noted the presence of a light grass cover, but conditions are still expected to favour batting. Remember, this is the same venue where India piled up 256 for 4 against Zimbabwe during the T20 World Cup.Sanju Samson (wk), Ruturaj Gaikwad (capt), Ayush Mhatre, Matt Short, Shivam Dube, Sarfaraz Khan, Kartik Sharma, Jamie Overton, Noor Ahmed, Matt Henry, Anshul KambojImpact Sub: Prashant Veer/Khaleel AhmedPriyansh Arya, Prabhsimran Singh (wk), Cooper Connolly, Shreyas Iyer (capt), Nehal Wadhera, Shashank Singh, Marcus Stoinis, Marco Jansen, Xavier Bartlett, Vijaykumar Vyshak, Arshdeep SinghImpact Sub: Yuzvendra ChahalIt will be bright and sunny during the day, with temperatures peaking around 34°C. Conditions will turn partly cloudy and humid at night, with the mercury dipping to around 26°C.During match hours, there is no chance of rain, while temperatures are expected to hover between 29°C and 30°C. The conditions will remain hot and humid, with cloud cover likely through the evening.The CSK vs PBKS clash will be held at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai, with the match set to begin at 7:30 PM IST. The game will be broadcast on the Star Sports Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar.Shreyas Iyer (c), Priyansh Arya, Harnoor Singh, Mitchell Owen, Vishnu Vinod, Nehal Wadhera, Azmatullah Omarzai, Marco Jansen, Marcus Stoinis, Arshdeep Singh, Xavier Bartlett, Yuzvendra Chahal, Lockie Ferguson, Harpreet Brar, Vijaykumar Vyshak, Yash Thakur, Cooper Connolly, Ben Dwarshuis, Musheer Khan, Praveen Dubey, Vishal Nishad, Suryansh Shedge, Prabhsimran Singh, Pyla Avinash, Shashank Singh.Ruturaj Gaikwad (c), Dewald Brevis, MS Dhoni, Urvil Patel, Sanju Samson, Shivam Dube, Ramakrishna Ghosh, Shreyas Gopal, Jamie Overton, Khaleel Ahmed, Anshul Kamboj, Gurjapneet Singh, Mukesh Choudhary, Noor Ahmad, Akeal Hosein, Prashant Veer, Matthew Short, Aman Khan, Matt Henry, Rahul Chahar, Zakary Foulkes, Spencer Johnson, Kartik Sharma, Sarfaraz Khan, Ayush Mhatre.
Article Summary: Chennai super kings take on punjab kings in their first home game of the ipl 2026. Csk lost their opening match of the tournament to rajasthan royals in guwahati. Ms dhoni could return to the dugout despite his calf strain. The game will be broadcast on the star sports network, while live streaming will be available on jiohotstar.

Article Title: Will Shreyas Iyer play today? PBKS sweat over captain’s fitness ahead of CSK clash
Article Text:
Punjab Kings' captain Shreyas Iyer winces in pain after getting hit by a shot from batting partner Cooper Connolly (AP Photo/Ashwini Bhatia)

Watch Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner

There is cautious optimism around Shreyas Iyer ’s availability as Punjab Kings prepare to face Chennai Super Kings in their IPL 2026 clash at the MA Chidambaram Stadium.Iyer suffered a painful blow to his wrist in the previous match after being struck by a powerful shot from Cooper Connolly at the non-striker’s end, raising immediate concerns over his participation in this high-profile encounter.However, early signs suggest PBKS could receive a major boost. Assistant coach Brad Haddin confirmed that the injury is not serious, easing fears within the camp."There is no break (in the bone), which is a good thing. Now it is just about getting the swelling down and getting the movement back in the hand, so he should be right for tomorrow," Haddin said.The update has come as a relief for Punjab , especially with Iyer’s leadership and batting crucial to their plans this season. The skipper has also reportedly looked in good touch during practice, even clearing the ropes with ease, indicating that his recovery is on track.PBKS head into the contest with momentum after a strong start to their campaign, including a win over Gujarat Titans. Their recent record at Chepauk further boosts confidence, having won at the venue in each of the last three seasons — a rare feat against CSK at home.On the other hand, Chennai Super Kings find themselves under early pressure following a disappointing batting display in their opener against Rajasthan Royals. With conditions in Chennai expected to be more batting-friendly, the contest could turn into a high-scoring affair.
Article Summary: Shreyas iyer suffered a painful blow to his wrist in the previous match. Assistant coach brad haddin confirmed that the injury is not serious. The skipper has also reportedly looked in good touch during practice. Pbks head into the contest with momentum after a strong start to their campaign.

Article Title: ‘I request you with folded hands’: R Ashwin’s emotional plea to Rishabh Pant
Article Text:
Lucknow Super Giants' captain Rishabh Pant (AP Photo/Manish Swarup)

Watch Mukul Choudhary on LSG’s game plan: backing partnerships & staying fearless Mukul Choudhary on LSG’s game plan: backing partnerships & staying fearless

Poll Should Rishabh Pant commit to opening the batting for all IPL 2026 matches? Yes, he should open every match. No, he should remain flexible with his position.

Former India spinner Ravichandran Ashwin has made a strong appeal to Lucknow Super Giants skipper Rishabh Pant , asking him to commit to opening the batting throughout the IPL 2026 season.Pant’s batting position has been a major talking point heading into the new campaign, especially after a mixed run in the previous edition where he struggled for consistency apart from a lone century. In their recent clash against Delhi Capitals at Ekana Cricket Stadium, Pant promoted himself to the top but his outing was cut short by an unfortunate run-out.Opening alongside Mitchell Marsh , Pant added a left-right combination at the top, pushing the in-form Aiden Markram down to No.3. The LSG captain looked fluent during his brief stay, even striking a crisp straight drive off Mukesh Kumar, before a freak moment saw Marsh’s shot deflect onto the stumps at the non-striker’s end, catching Pant short.Reacting to the situation, Ashwin felt Pant should avoid uncertainty and stick to opening."It was very unfortunate the way Rishabh Pant got out, and even more unfortunate the way he talked after the match. He was asked whether he would open the innings, and he replied 50-50. I request you with folded hands, please open in every match. Justin Langer, or whoever is there in the LSG team management, should go and tell Rishabh Pant to go out there and play freely in the powerplay.Go and play the entire 14 games as an opener," Ashwin said on his YouTube channel.He further explained that Pant’s impact could reduce if he bats lower down the order."If he comes into bat after the powerplay, the bowlers have a strategy to stop him. So, I think he should open the batting, for himself and for LSG as well," he added.Pant’s record as an opener in the IPL remains limited. Across six innings at the top, he has scored 132 runs at an average of 22.00 and a strike rate of 128.16, including one half-century.Despite Ashwin’s strong stance, Pant indicated that his role is not yet finalised."It’s still a 50-50 call, but you’ll definitely see me batting in the top order this season," Pant said after the defeat.Reflecting on the run-out and the loss, the wicketkeeper-batter stressed the importance of moving forward quickly."The best way to recover is to move on and not dwell on it too much. Certain things are beyond your control, and thinking about them only puts you on the back foot. It’s about looking ahead and staying positive," he said.LSG will next take on Sunrisers Hyderabad, led by Ishan Kishan, at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium on April 5, where Pant’s batting position will once again be under the spotlight.
Article Summary: Former india spinner ravichandran ashwin has made a strong appeal to lucknow super giants skipper rishabh pant. Ashwin wants pant to commit to opening the batting throughout the ipl 2026 season. Pant's batting position has been a major talking point heading into the new campaign, especially after a mixed run in the previous edition.

Article Title: Mitchell Santner joins MI squad ahead of DC clash
Article Text:
Mitchell Santner (Image: PTI)

Watch Mike Hussey admits CSK were outplayed after batting collapse Mike Hussey admits CSK were outplayed after batting collapse

Mumbai: In a big boost for Mumbai Indians ahead of their IPL 2026 clash against Delhi Capitals on Saturday, New Zealand captain and left-arm spinning all-rounder Mitchell Santner has joined the MI squad in Delhi on Thursday, TOI has learnt. Santner had missed Mumbai Indians’ six-wicket win over Kolkata Knight Riders last Sunday at the Wankhede Stadium.In Santner’s absence, MI handed a debut to Afghanistan’s young spinner Allah Ghazanfar, who conceded 51 runs without taking a wicket in his four overs against KKR’s aggressive batting lineup.Santner is now available for selection for Mumbai Indians’ next match against Delhi Capitals, scheduled to be played at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi on Saturday afternoon. Regarded as one of the top all-rounders in white-ball cricket, Santner picked up two wickets at an average of 92.50 and an economy rate of 6.60 in eight matches during the 2026 T20 World Cup. He also scored 120 runs at an average of 40.00 and a strike rate of 142.85. The 34-year-old led New Zealand to the final, where they lost to India by 96 runs in Ahmedabad on March 8.In IPL 2025, Santner took 10 wickets at an average of 31.30 with an economy rate of 7.92 and also scored 40 runs at an average of 20.00 and a strike rate of 121.21 in 13 matches.However, while Santner has rejoined the squad, there is still no update on Mumbai Indians’ other key overseas player, England all-rounder Will Jacks, who also missed MI’s opening game of IPL 2026.Mumbai Indians upcoming matchesApril 4 – vs Delhi Capitals (Delhi) – 3:30 PMApril 7 – vs Rajasthan Royals (Guwahati) – 7:30 PMApril 12 – vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru (Mumbai) – 7:30 PMApril 16 – vs Punjab Kings (Mumbai) – 7:30 PMApril 20 – vs Gujarat Titans (Ahmedabad) – 7:30 PMApril 23 – vs Chennai Super Kings (Mumbai) – 7:30 PMApril 29 – vs Sunrisers Hyderabad (Mumbai) – 7:30 PMMay 2 – vs Chennai Super Kings (Chennai) – 7:30 PMMay 4 – vs Lucknow Super Giants (Mumbai) – 7:30 PMMay 10 – vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru (Raipur) – 7:30 PMMay 14 – vs Punjab Kings (Dharamshala) – 7:30 PMMay 20 – vs Kolkata Knight Riders (Kolkata) – 7:30 PMMay 24 – vs Rajasthan Royals (Mumbai) – 3:30 PM
Article Summary: New zealand all-rounder mitchell santner has rejoined mumbai indians. Santner had missed mumbai indians’ six-wicket win over kolkata knight riders last sunday at the wankhede stadium. Afghanistan’s young spinner allah ghazanfar conceded 51 runs without taking a wicket in his four overs against kkr.

Article Title: Ajinkya Rahane completes 200 IPL matches; joins elite club of MS Dhoni, Virat Kohli
Article Text:
Ajinkya Rahane (Image: IPL)

Watch IPL 2026: Ajinkya Rahane backs KKR’s young pace attack after loss IPL 2026: Ajinkya Rahane backs KKR’s young pace attack after loss

Elite company in IPL history

Ajinkya Rahane etched his name into the record books as he became the 11th cricketer to play 200 matches in the Indian Premier League (IPL). The milestone came during Kolkata Knight Riders’ clash against Sunrisers Hyderabad in IPL 2026 at the Eden Gardens.Rahane, who made his IPL debut in 2008 for Mumbai Indians, has been one of the most consistent performers in the league over the years. Ahead of this landmark game, the veteran batter had featured in 199 IPL matches, scoring 5,099 runs at an average of around 30, including 2 centuries and 34 fifties.Ajinkya Rahane began his IPL journey with Mumbai Indians, representing them in the first two editions (2008 and 2009). He then moved to Rajasthan Royals, where he enjoyed a long stint from 2011 to 2015 and returned again for the 2018 and 2019 seasons. Rahane was part of the Rising Pune Super Giants setup in 2016 and 2017 before joining Delhi Capitals ahead of IPL 2020 through a trade deal, where he played until 2021. He later featured for Chennai Super Kings in the 2023 and 2024 seasons. Rahane was picked by Kolkata Knight Riders in the IPL 2022 mega auction and re-signed again in the 2025 mega auction. Since 2025, he has been a key part of KKR and currently leads the side as captain.With this achievement, Rahane joins an elite list of players who have crossed the 200-match mark in IPL history. Only 10 players have played more matches than him, with MS Dhoni leading the chart, followed by Rohit Sharma, Virat Kohli, Dinesh Karthik, Ravindra Jadeja, Ravichandran Ashwin , Shikhar Dhawan, Suresh Raina, Robin Uthappa , and Ambati Rayudu.Rahane’s longevity and adaptability across teams and roles highlight his importance in the league, having evolved from a classical top-order batter into a dependable captain for Kolkata.
Article Summary: Ajinkya rahane becomes 11th cricketer to play 200 matches in the indian premier league (ipl) the milestone came during kolkata knight riders’ clash against sunrisers hyderabad in ipl 2026 at the eden gardens. Rahane made his ipl debut in 2008 for mumbai indians.

Article Title: Stephen Curry: “I’m pulled in different areas”: Stephen Curry opens up about pressure in his family life as Ayesha Curry faces scrutiny
Article Text:
Stephen Curry opens up about pressure in his family life as Ayesha Curry faces scrutiny.(Image via Getty Images)

Stephen Curry shares an honest opinion about the pressure of responsibilities he faces in his personal life amid marriage to Ayesha Curry



Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, got brutally trolled for her controversial comments on marriage



Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, and his wife, Ayesha Curry, seem to have built a pretty beautiful life for themselves and their four young children.While the NBA legend Stephen Curry has always tried to keep his personal and professional life different, the four time NBA champion has been vocal about the pressure he faces in his life.A few weeks ago, in an interview with CNBC, the Golden State Warriors’ star player opened up about the pressure he is under at home as he said, "It's an idea of, 'Are you doing everything you can to take care of people that are relying on you?'"The NBA legend added, “Are you fulfilling your full potential in all different areas that I've set out to do? [...] We all like to be a better husband, a better father, more present at times, just because we're pulled — I'm pulled — in a lot of different areas…”Stephen Curry continued, “Those are daily commitments, daily thoughts that you have to weave through."Over the last few years, Stephen Curry’s high profile marriage to popular entrepreneur and chef, Ayesha Curry, has raised eyebrows.This has also led to immense trolling as Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, has continuously been trolled and shamed for her comments and opinions.A few months ago, Stephen Curry’s wife, Ayesha Curry, made an appearance on Alex Cooper’s popular podcast, Call Her Daddy, where she opened up about how she had different aspirations in life which were relatively different from marrying an NBA legend.In a heartfelt conversation, Ayesha Curry shared how she initially planned to have a career of her own and did not want to get married or have children.But her feelings changed when she fell deeply in love with the Golden State Warriors’ star player, Stephen Curry, when she was a young adult.The two got married young and have had four children since then.While Ayesha Curry’s statements seemed like an innocent confession, she was brutally trolled as fans accused her of wanting to divorce Stephen Curry.This led to both Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry distancing themselves from the drama even as they continue to remain silent about it.
Article Summary: Stephen curry opens up about pressure in his family life as ayesha curry faces scrutiny. Nba legend stephen curry shares an honest opinion about the pressure of responsibilities he faces in his personal life amid marriage to ayesha curry. Curry’s high profile marriage to popular entrepreneur and chef, ayesham curry, has raised eyebrows.

Article Title: NHL Standings: Buffalo Sabres on verge of ending NHL-record playoff drought with win over Ottawa Senators
Article Text:
Buffalo Sabres missed the playoffs for 14 consecutive seasons, the longest postseason drought in NHL history (Image via Reuters Photo)

Buffalo Sabres' one win against the Ottawa Senators could end the NHL's longest playoff drought

The Buffalo Sabres are on the verge of making NHL history positively, as they can end the league's longest playoff drought with a win over the Ottawa Senators in their upcoming game. This drought outlasted the previous mark held by the Florida Panthers from 2001 to 2011 by four full seasons. According to TSN, the Sabres will punch their ticket to the postseason with a win over the Ottawa Senators at the Canadian Tire Centre on Thursday.Buffalo can also clinch with a point against the Senators if the Philadelphia Flyers defeat the Detroit Red Wings and the Carolina Hurricanes defeat the Columbus Blue Jackets. The team has been one of the hottest in the league in the second half of the season, climbing the standings after a strong run of form and putting themselves in position to qualify. According to reports, the Buffalo Sabres have scored 46-21-8, for 100 points, and the Ottawa Senators have secured 38-26-10, for 86 points. The Buffalo Sabres are very close to securing a playoff spot after 14 years without one, a streak that sets the NHL record.This drought outlasts the previous mark held by the Florida Panthers from 2001 to 2011 by four full seasons. The team saw this big turnaround this season after they fired general manager Kevyn Adams back in December and replaced him with Jarmo Kekalainen. At the time, they had a 14–14–4 record and have gone 32-7-4 since.As for their earlier performance, the Sabres seemed to miss the playoffs once again this year as the team sat last in the Eastern Conference in December before going on a 10-game win streak and posting a record of 35-7-4 since that streak began on Dec. 8.Reports suggest that Buffalo last reached the playoffs in 2011, during current head coach Lindy Ruff’s first stint with the team. Next, Ruff rejoined the Sabres in 2024 after 12 years away, going 36-39-7 last season.The Buffalo Sabres need just one win over Ottawa to clinch and erase a 1,151-game postseason absence, the longest active in major North American pro sports. Besides, the Panthers' 10-year wait ended in 2012, underscoring Buffalo's prolonged struggle.Meanwhile, the Sabres have just a two-point lead over the Tampa Bay Lightning in the Atlantic Division and are tied with the Carolina Hurricanes for first in the conference.According to reports, the Buffalo Sabres and the Ottawa Senators are going to lock horns with each other on Thursday, April 2, 2026, at the Canadian Tire Centre from 7 PM EST.
Article Summary: Buffalo sabres missed the playoffs for 14 consecutive seasons, the longest postseason drought in nhl history. This drought outlasted the previous mark held by the florida panthers from 2001 to 2011 by four full seasons. The buffalo sabres need just one win over ottawa senators to clinch and erase a 1,151-game postseason absence.

Article Title: Iga Swiatek: Iga Swiatek seen training with Rafael Nadal as Francisco Roig steps in after Wim Fissette split before clay season
Article Text:
Iga Swiatek and Rafael Nadal (Image Via Getty)

Rafael Nadal and Iga Swiatek training together as Francisco Roig joins coaching team after Wim Fissette exit

A new video is getting a lot of attention in tennis right now. It shows Iga Swiatek on court with Rafael Nadal at his academy in Spain. The timing is important. Swiatek is preparing for the clay season, which is a big part of her year. After a slow start to this season, this training block could shape what comes next for her.The video, shared online by fans and tennis pages, shows Swiatek talking with Nadal and working on her shots. It feels like a reset moment. She has been searching for rhythm in recent tournaments, and now she is spending time at the Rafael Nadal Academy to fix things before the European clay swing begins.Iga Swiatek’s season has not gone as planned so far. She reached the quarter-finals at the Australian Open, Dubai, and Indian Wells, but could not go further. Then came a tough loss at the Miami Open, where she was beaten by Magda Linette in a three-set match at Hard Rock Stadium.Soon after that loss, Swiatek decided to part ways with her coach Wim Fissette. That decision raised many questions about her next step. Now, there is some clarity.She has started working with Francisco Roig, a well-known coach who spent many years with Rafael Nadal. Roig was part of Nadal’s team during most of his Grand Slam wins.He also had a short stint with Emma Raducanu and earlier worked with Matteo Berrettini.Right now, Swiatek is putting in long practice sessions at Nadal’s academy. In the video clips, she is seen listening closely, adjusting her strokes, and having detailed chats with Nadal and Roig. It looks focused and calm, not rushed.Roig brings a lot of experience. As a former player, he had a long doubles career and later became known for his coaching work. After retiring in 2001, he joined Nadal’s team in 2005 and stayed for many successful years.For Swiatek, this move is about getting back to her best level. She has even skipped the Billie Jean King Cup qualifiers to focus on what she called “quality work” on her game.The clay season is coming soon, and this is where she has always been strong. Training with Nadal on clay, with Roig guiding her, could give her the push she needs.
Article Summary: Iga swiatek has been working with rafael nadal at his academy in spain. She is preparing for the clay season, which is a big part of her year. Francisco roig was part of nadal’s team during most of his grand slam wins. He also had a short stint with emma raducanu.

Article Title: Craig Berube: Toronto Maple Leafs coach Craig Berube addresses problematic team culture concerns by Keith Pelley amid season struggles
Article Text:
Head coach Craig Berube’s future with the franchise is skeptical as Toronto Maple Leafs signals a major reset (Image Via Getty Images)

Craig Berube responds to culture concerns as Toronto Maple Leafs face uncertain offseason

With the Toronto Maple Leafs firing their general manager, Brad Treliving, in a major organizational shake-up, things have become very uncertain for Toronto Maple Leafs head coach Craig Berube. Amid this uncertainty, Toronto Maple Leafs head coach Craig Berube has pushed back against suggestions of a problematic team culture during a press conference following Wednesday's practice in Anaheim, emphasizing the team’s performance issues over deeper cultural flaws. He has clearly responded to MLSE President Keith Pelly's recent comments, noting an "off" culture this season.Recently, the Toronto Maple Leafs fired general manager Brad Treliving in a major organizational shake-up, with MLSE President and CEO Keith Pelley announcing that the Maple Leafs are entering a new phase focused on long-term success and cultural change.Considering this season’s NHL standings, the Toronto Maple Leafs cannot qualify for the top 10 and currently sit in the 14th place. They have scored 32-30-13 and 77 points so far in the Atlantic Division of the Eastern Conference. Toronto Maple Leafs head coach Craig Berube addressed growing concerns about the team's culture following recent comments from MLSE President and CEO Keith Pelley, as the organization continues to evaluate major changes after a disappointing season.Speaking after practice, Berube downplayed the idea that the team's struggles were solely due to a cultural problem; instead, he stressed that the responsibility lies across the entire organization, players, coaches, and goaltending, and that the team needs to function more as a unit. He also emphasized that the Maple Leafs still have foundational players capable of contending but need better overall support and team play.Along with this, Berube also addressed his own uncertain future after Pelley indicated a major reset within the organization. The Leafs coach further stated that he is focused on coaching the team and preparing for games rather than worrying about his job status, stating that those decisions are out of his control.Berube added, “I am focused on coaching the team, honestly. Tomorrow, we have a game. That is what I’m doing. I can’t control that. Whatever happens, happens. I am the coach here now. My focus is on the team. That’s it.”Amid the growing uncertainty, the coach highlighted the need for team-wide support around foundational players, stressing, "They need support. The team needs to play as a unit and a team. It is not just all on them. That’s everybody, goalie, coaches. That is what makes it go."With the Maple Leafs entering a critical offseason with a new general manager and potential coaching decisions, Berube’s future and the team’s roster will likely be determined by the new team.
Article Summary: Toronto maple leafs head coach craig berube addressed growing concerns about the team's culture following recent comments from mlse president and ceo keith pelley. Berube stressed that the responsibility lies across the entire organization, players, coaches, and goaltending, and that the team needs to function more as a unit.

Article Title: Taylor Barnard: “I am still getting used to it”: Taylor Barnard on settling in at DS Penske this season
Article Text:
Taylor Barnard (Image credit: Instagram)

Taylor Barnard yet to find form this season





Taylor Barnard feels more comfortable in the Formula E paddock now



Things are yet to look up for Taylor Barnard since he moved to DS Penske this season. The Briton was the youngest Formula E driver last year and bagged multiple podiums in his rookie campaign. However, he is yet to hit his stride this season, though the way he is working on himself is expected to bring results sooner rather than later. The 21-year-old recently opened up about his struggles and how this season differs from his rookie year.Taylor Barnard made his Formula E debut with NEOM McLaren in Season 10 but went on to compete as a full-time driver last season. Since the team exited the motorsport, Barnard moved to DS Penske, while his teammate Sam Bird pursued other opportunities.Speaking about switching teams, Barnard told Formulae.com in an interview, “You know the basics and you know that you have systems and you know that you have the same tyres and it's the same car. But the way that you actually try to maximise it is completely different. So, I’ll be honest and say I’m still getting used to it.”“It's been okay. I prefer to be a bit harsh on myself and make sure that I keep working as hard as I can instead of being relaxed and going, ‘Oh, everyone’s telling me I’m doing a great job’, so I’d rather work a bit too hard than the opposite,” he added.Taylor Barnard is no longer the youngest driver on the Formula E grid after a number of rookies, such as Pepe Martí, joined this season.Speaking about his growing experience, Barnard said, “To be honest, the longer that I stay here, obviously the more familiar faces I know. Last year was a little bit intimidating not knowing everybody, and Sam (Bird) was walking through the paddock and saying hello to everyone left and right. But this year I feel a bit more comfortable; I know a lot of people around here. I think in the next couple of years some of the older guys on the grid will not be here anymore and perhaps some of my friends or my colleagues, I guess, from people who I’ve raced in my junior career will be stepping in. So, I think the times will change in the next few years.”Barnard is yet to hit top form this season, but he did come close to a podium in Mexico, where he finished fourth. He is currently 13th in the Formula E Drivers’ Standings with 14 points. He still has room to improve as there are still eleven races remaining before the season concludes.Also read: Exclusive interview: Edoardo Mortara shines for Mahindra Racing this season, says “important to keep your feet on the ground”

Article Title: Travis Kelce: Travis Kelce’s big decision reportedly leaves Taylor Swift facing “sleepless nights” weeks before lavish wedding
Article Text:
Travis Kelce’s big decision reportedly leaves Taylor Swift facing “sleepless nights” weeks before lavish wedding.(Image via Getty Images)

Taylor Swift might be having problems with Travis Kelce’s decision to return to the field



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have decided on a luxurious property for their wedding



Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are just days away from tying the knot in Rhode Island, after dating for close to three years.While the couple have remained strictly private about what they have been planning for their wedding, Taylor Swift is reportedly facing a few issues as Travis Kelce has decided to return to the field for his 14th season in the league.A few days ago, as per Heat World, a source has revealed that, “Taylor totally supports him going back for another season, it’s what he loves, but it hasn’t made the wedding planning easy…”The source added, “Or the honeymoon for that matter because he’s going to have such limited availability once the preseason starts.”As per Heat World, the source continued, “Travis handed off most of the planning to Taylor because she has a real vision of what she wants. The downside of that is she’s getting very overwhelmed, to the point she’s having sleepless nights as a result.”After the Kansas City Chiefs missed the playoffs in the last season, there were strong rumors about the popular tight end, Travis Kelce, opting for retirement ahead of the upcoming season.But a few days ago, Travis Kelce sparked shockwaves across the league as he announced his contract extension with the Kansas City Chiefs for a whopping $54 million.While this had sparked a debate among fans, the billionaire pop star Taylor Swift has stayed away from talking about her future husband’s career in public.Travis Kelce also credited Taylor Swift for motivating him to return to the field for his 14th season as he said, "Without a doubt, we share the same love for what we do, and we've had this, you know, fortunately, we've had this desire since we were kids in our selective professions…”The Kansas City Chiefs’ tight end added, “It's just, it's amazing to see her keep going to the table, keep finding new things to write about, keep finding, you know, new melodies and things like that. And on top of that, still seeing her have that love and joy in what she does."Though Page Six has reported that Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have decided on Ocean Hall in Rhode Island to be their wedding venue, the high profile couple has stayed away from commenting on the rumors.
Article Summary: Travis kelce’s big decision reportedly leaves taylor swift facing “sleepless nights” weeks before lavish wedding. The couple have remained strictly private about what they have been planning for their wedding. Travis kelce has decided to return to the field for his 14th season in the league.

Article Title: Kansas City Chiefs: NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs tipped to target $16M Pro Bowl Atlanta Falcons star TE days after Travis Kelce’s contract extension
Article Text:
Kansas City Chiefs tipped to target $16M Pro Bowl Atlanta Falcons star TE days after Travis Kelce’s contract extension.(Image via X)

Kansas City Chiefs are tipped to explore a deal with the Atlanta Falcons’ popular tight end, Kyle Pitts , after a disappointing season

The Kansas City Chiefs experienced a pretty disappointing run on the field in the last season, with six wins and eleven losses.Last season also marked the first time since 2014 that the Kansas City Chiefs failed to make it to the playoffs. Now, just days after the team signed a contract extension with popular tight end, Travis Kelce , it seems the team is being tipped to lean on the Atlanta Falcons’ star player.After an impressive performance in the last season, the 25 year old Atlanta Falcons’ tight end, Kyle Pitts, is being pitched to the Kansas City Chiefs.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Moe Moton, noted that the Kansas City Chiefs could be interested in signing the Atlanta Falcons’ star player, Kyle Pitts.Bleacher Report’s Moe Moton noted in a report, “The Chiefs could pair Kelce with Pitts, who would take the franchise tight-end baton from the future Hall of Famer. In this scenario, Kelce would likely see a reduced role, which would preserve him for the season.”Moe Moton added, “Early in the previous campaign, head coach Andy Reid discussed managing Kelce’s snap count. With Pitts, he can do that and still get production out of the position in his offense.”This also comes days after Travis Kelce’s $54 million contract extension with the Kansas City Chiefs sparked a heated debate among fans.However, the Kansas City Chiefs have remained distant from the speculations.Back in 2021, Kyle Pitts was named to the Pro Bowl in his rookie season as he became the second rookie tight end in NFL history to record over 1,000 receiving yards.The 25 year old Atlanta Falcons’ tight end, Kyle Pitts, recorded a stellar performance in the last season after an underwhelming season in 2024.In the 2025 season, Kyle Pitts finished as one of the top tight ends in the league as he recorded 88 receptions for 928 yards and five touchdowns across 17 games.The Atlanta Falcons’ star player has shown impressive growth since the 2024 season, when he recorded 47 receptions for 602 yards and four touchdowns in 17 games.This also resulted in the Atlanta Falcons placing the franchise tag on Kyle Pitts in February.While the Atlanta Falcons have maintained their distance from trade talks about Kyle Pitts for now, all eyes are on his performance in the next season.
Article Summary: Kansas city chiefs tipped to target $16m pro bowl atlanta falcons star te days after travis kelce’s contract extension. Kyle pitts was named to the pro bowl in his rookie season as he became the second rookie tight end in nfl history to record over 1,000 receiving yards.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Las Vegas Raiders urged to explore $58M Cleveland Browns Pro Bowl WR amid concerns over 2025 form
Article Text:
Las Vegas Raiders urged to explore $58M Cleveland Browns Pro Bowl WR amid concerns over 2025 form.(Image via X)

Las Vegas Raiders tipped to lean on the Cleveland Browns ’ wide receiver Jerry Jeudy amid a poor performance in the last season

The Las Vegas Raiders’ 2025 season was a pretty disappointing one, with it being the fourth season in a row of missing the playoffs.With just three wins and fourteen losses in the last season, the Las Vegas Raiders are working hard on their roster.While the Las Vegas Raiders recently signed Jalen Nailor, the team is now being encouraged to seek the Cleveland Browns’ star wide receiver, Jerry Jeudy.ID@undefinedCaption not available.A few hours ago, Sports Illustrated’s Ryan Shea noted in a report, “Hypothetically, the Las Vegas Raiders could look to add wide receiver Jerry Jeudy to their roster as they prepare for the 2026 season…”Ryan Shea added, “Jeudy’s proven route running, ability to create separation, and deep-field explosiveness could give the franchise quarterback a reliable weapon right away. His presence would help stretch defenses, open opportunities for other receivers, and immediately elevate the Raiders’ passing attack…”He continued, “Jeudy is a polished route runner who can stretch the field, create separation, and give Mendoza a reliable WR1 to build chemistry with from day one.”This has sparked a debate, considering how the Cleveland Browns’ star wide receiver, Jerry Jeudy, failed to perform well in the last season after a stellar performance in the 2024 season.However, the Las Vegas Raiders have stayed away from commenting on the speculations.The Cleveland Browns’ star player, Jerry Jeudy, showed immense potential when he was traded to the team in 2024 by the Denver Broncos.Jerry Jeudy was also named to his first Pro Bowl in the 2024 season after he recorded 90 receptions for 1229 receiving yards with four touchdowns in just 17 games.While the Cleveland Browns’ fans expected a lot from him in the 2025 season, unfortunately, Jerry Jeudy’s performance recorded a relatively steady decline.In the last season, the 26 year old Cleveland Browns’ wide receiver recorded 50 receptions for 602 yards and two touchdowns in 17 games.A few days ago, as per Cleveland.com, analyst Dan Labbe opened up about the decline in his performance as he said, “Maybe the version of Jeudy we saw in 2024 was an outlier, but it’s hard to believe the version we saw in 2025 is going to be what he is for the remainder of his time with the Browns…”With a $58 million contract with the Cleveland Browns, all eyes are on whether Jerry Jeudy will be able to prove his worth in the next season.
Article Summary: Las vegas raiders urged to explore $58m cleveland browns pro bowl wr amid concerns over 2025 form. Las vegas raiders tipped to lean on the cleveland browns ’ wide receiver jerry jeudy amid a poor performance in the last season. With a $58 million contract, all eyes are on whether jerry jeudy will be able to prove his worth in the next season.
